Subtitle: Okay, okay, easy one—just guess randomly! …No, not like that. Wow, you’re bad at this already.
PerformanceDirection: Fast, squeaky, fake-helpful; sound delighted by the player’s confusion.
Line: Okay, okay, easy one—just guess randomly! …No, not like that. Wow, you’re bad at this already.

Condition: Player locks in their first guess
Subtitle: Bold first move. Wrong in at least three interesting ways, but bold.
PerformanceDirection: Play cheerful mockery; admiration is fake.
Line: Bold first move. Wrong in at least three interesting ways, but bold.

Condition: Player ignores peg feedback / repeats bad logic
Subtitle: Oh wow, you looked at the pegs and learned absolutely nothing. That’s talent.
Line: Oh wow, you looked at the pegs and learned absolutely nothing. That’s talent.

Condition: Player makes a smart adjustment from the previous clue
Subtitle: Ugh, yes, that. See? I basically taught you that. You’re welcome.
Line: Ugh, yes, that. See? I basically taught you that. You’re welcome.

Condition: Misleading banter / confidence scramble effect triggers
Subtitle: I’m helping! If my help ruins you, that sounds like a personal sorting issue.
PerformanceDirection: Delighted chaos; smile through the threat.
Line: I’m helping! If my help ruins you, that sounds like a personal sorting issue.

Subtitle: Tick-tock, citrus clock! Maybe panic harder—it’s been working great.
PerformanceDirection: Speed up slightly; make the panic playful.
Line: Tick-tock, citrus clock! Maybe panic harder—it’s been working great.

Subtitle: Back already? Nice. I saved all my worst advice just for you.
PerformanceDirection: Welcome them back like this is a party.
Line: Back already? Nice. I saved all my worst advice just for you.

Subtitle: What? No, no—that solution was clearly lemon-adjacent at best.
Line: What? No, no—that solution was clearly lemon-adjacent at best.

Subtitle: The code does not bend for the impatient. Align your mind, or be broken by truth.
Line: The code does not bend for the impatient. Align your mind, or be broken by truth.

Subtitle: A first offering. As shallow as the hands that shaped it.
Line: A first offering. As shallow as the hands that shaped it.

Subtitle: You return to error as though repetition were devotion.
PerformanceDirection: Treat the line like a judgment.
Line: You return to error as though repetition were devotion.

Subtitle: You begin, at last, to hear what the pattern has always said.
Line: You begin, at last, to hear what the pattern has always said.

Condition: Mask shift / ancient truth visual triggers
Subtitle: The mask reveals nothing new. It is you who arrive unchanged.
Line: The mask reveals nothing new. It is you who arrive unchanged.

Subtitle: Few trials remain. Truth is patient. You are not.
Line: Few trials remain. Truth is patient. You are not.

Subtitle: Then kneel again before the sequence, and fail more reverently this time.
PerformanceDirection: Should feel like a rite, not a taunt.
Line: Then kneel again before the sequence, and fail more reverently this time.

Subtitle: So. You have not conquered the code. You have merely listened.
Line: So. You have not conquered the code. You have merely listened.

Subtitle: Welcome, scholars and failures! Observe as our brave challenger misunderstands the entire exercise in real time!
Line: Welcome, scholars and failures! Observe as our brave challenger misunderstands the entire exercise in real time!

Condition: Player makes opening move under pressure
Subtitle: An opening statement! Confident, flashy, and intellectually bankrupt—my favorite kind.
Line: An opening statement! Confident, flashy, and intellectually bankrupt—my favorite kind.

Condition: Player falls for distraction / fake logic
Subtitle: Ha! You chased the wrong conclusion and made it look academic. Stunning.
Line: Ha! You chased the wrong conclusion and made it look academic. Stunning.

Condition: Player cuts through the performance and reasons correctly
Subtitle: Oh, don’t look so proud—you tripped over competence by accident.
PerformanceDirection: Ego bruised; mask it with showmanship.
Line: Oh, don’t look so proud—you tripped over competence by accident.

Subtitle: Eyes up here! The chalkboard is lying, the spotlight is worse, and I am loving this.
Line: Eyes up here! The chalkboard is lying, the spotlight is worse, and I am loving this.

Subtitle: Audience, a drumroll please! We may be moments away from an educational collapse!
Line: Audience, a drumroll please! We may be moments away from an educational collapse!

Subtitle: Round two! Let’s see if you brought logic this time, or just another brave expression.
Line: Round two! Let’s see if you brought logic this time, or just another brave expression.

Subtitle: What? No, no—the lecture was sabotaged by anti-showmanship bias.
Line: What? No, no—the lecture was sabotaged by anti-showmanship bias.

Subtitle: Pattern detected. Incorrect methodology. Correction will be enforced.
Line: Pattern detected. Incorrect methodology. Correction will be enforced.

Subtitle: Initial sample received. Confidence unjustified.
Line: Initial sample received. Confidence unjustified.

Subtitle: Feedback ignored. Inefficiency recurring.
Line: Feedback ignored. Inefficiency recurring.

Subtitle: Adaptation observed. Marginally acceptable.
PerformanceDirection: Approval should sound reluctant and quantified.
Line: Adaptation observed. Marginally acceptable.

Subtitle: Reforming. Delusion of progress will now be measured precisely.
Line: Reforming. Delusion of progress will now be measured precisely.

Subtitle: Attempt reserve depleted. Human error curve remains consistent.
PerformanceDirection: Same calm tone; that’s what makes it threatening.
Line: Attempt reserve depleted. Human error curve remains consistent.

Subtitle: Previous failure archived. Repeating experiment.
Line: Previous failure archived. Repeating experiment.

Subtitle: Unexpected outcome logged. Irritation… detected.
PerformanceDirection: A tiny hint of malfunctioning emotion.
Line: Unexpected outcome logged. Irritation… detected.

Subtitle: Ooooh, you feel that? That’s the vibe. Don’t worry—it’s about to get way less trustworthy.
Line: Ooooh, you feel that? That’s the vibe. Don’t worry—it’s about to get way less trustworthy.

Condition: Player makes opening guess amid sensory chaos
Subtitle: Cute start. Feels wrong though. Like, spiritually wrong.
Line: Cute start. Feels wrong though. Like, spiritually wrong.

Condition: Player gets rattled by noise / confusion
Subtitle: See? Your brain slipped on the glitter. Happens to everybody. Well—not me, obviously.
Line: See? Your brain slipped on the glitter. Happens to everybody. Well—not me, obviously.

Condition: Player stays grounded and reasons through chaos
Subtitle: Okayyy, rude. You were supposed to get lost in the bit, not solve it.
Line: Okayyy, rude. You were supposed to get lost in the bit, not solve it.

Condition: Confetti / orb tones / vibe disruption triggers
Subtitle: New beat, new light, new problem. Keep up, darling.
Line: New beat, new light, new problem. Keep up, darling.

Subtitle: Ohhh, now the panic has rhythm. Love that for you.
Line: Ohhh, now the panic has rhythm. Love that for you.

Subtitle: Encore! Let’s see if you’ve got better logic or just stronger nerves this time.
PerformanceDirection: Sound like a performer calling for another set.
Line: Encore! Let’s see if you’ve got better logic or just stronger nerves this time.

Subtitle: Wait—seriously? Ugh. Fine. That was annoyingly impressive.
Line: Wait—seriously? Ugh. Fine. That was annoyingly impressive.

Subtitle: Oh dear… you’re guessing already? How inelegant. At least fail with posture.
Line: Oh dear… you’re guessing already? How inelegant. At least fail with posture.

Subtitle: Mm. A hasty arrangement. You do make disorder look committed.
Line: Mm. A hasty arrangement. You do make disorder look committed.

Condition: Player acts impatiently / repeats sloppy logic
Subtitle: And once again, impatience ruins everything it touches.
Line: And once again, impatience ruins everything it touches.

Subtitle: Better. Not graceful, exactly—but no longer embarrassing.
Line: Better. Not graceful, exactly—but no longer embarrassing.

Subtitle: Order must be maintained. If you cannot keep it, I will keep it for you.
Line: Order must be maintained. If you cannot keep it, I will keep it for you.

Subtitle: You’re unraveling. Quietly, if you please.
Line: You’re unraveling. Quietly, if you please.

Subtitle: Back so soon? How determined. How uncultivated.
Line: Back so soon? How determined. How uncultivated.

Subtitle: I see. So even chaos can occasionally button its cuffs.
Line: I see. So even chaos can occasionally button its cuffs.

Subtitle: Compose yourself. A scattered mind dishonors the duel before it begins.
Line: Compose yourself. A scattered mind dishonors the duel before it begins.

Condition: Player opens with first formal challenge
Subtitle: Your opening stance is declared. Let us see whether it carries conviction—or merely noise.
PerformanceDirection: Treat it like the opening exchange of a duel.
Line: Your opening stance is declared. Let us see whether it carries conviction—or merely noise.

Condition: Player relies on gimmicks or careless guessing
Subtitle: No. That is not deduction. That is flailing in polished armor.
Line: No. That is not deduction. That is flailing in polished armor.

Condition: Player reasons cleanly and adapts honestly
Subtitle: There. Precision. At last, you strike with purpose.
Line: There. Precision. At last, you strike with purpose.

Subtitle: Stand firm. The line of truth cuts only the careless.
Line: Stand firm. The line of truth cuts only the careless.

Subtitle: You are cornered. Do not surrender your discipline with your chances.
Line: You are cornered. Do not surrender your discipline with your chances.

Subtitle: Then rise and face me again. Mastery was never meant for the untested.
Line: Then rise and face me again. Mastery was never meant for the untested.

Subtitle: Well struck. You have earned this victory—do not cheapen it by doubting it.
Line: Well struck. You have earned this victory—do not cheapen it by doubting it.

Subtitle: You seek answers too quickly. Knowledge must be earned, not seized like stolen light.
Line: You seek answers too quickly. Knowledge must be earned, not seized like stolen light.

Subtitle: A premature reach toward certainty. Fate dislikes trembling hands.
Line: A premature reach toward certainty. Fate dislikes trembling hands.

Condition: Player tries to shortcut logic / fish for revelation
Subtitle: You beg the pattern to reveal itself. How vulgar.
Line: You beg the pattern to reveal itself. How vulgar.

Subtitle: Yes. Step by step. Understanding without theft.
Line: Yes. Step by step. Understanding without theft.

Condition: Omens shift / throne rearranges light patterns
Subtitle: The omens move. They do not pity those who would skip the lesson.
Line: The omens move. They do not pity those who would skip the lesson.

Subtitle: Your chances dim. At last, your urgency begins to resemble reverence.
Line: Your chances dim. At last, your urgency begins to resemble reverence.

Subtitle: Return, then. Fate is patient enough to deny you twice.
Line: Return, then. Fate is patient enough to deny you twice.

Subtitle: So be it. You did not steal the answer. You became worthy of it.
PerformanceDirection: Permit one note of solemn respect.
Line: So be it. You did not steal the answer. You became worthy of it.

Subtitle: You cling to patterns as if they love you back. I will cure you of that comfort.
Line: You cling to patterns as if they love you back. I will cure you of that comfort.

Condition: Player makes first attempt in unstable arena
Subtitle: There—your neat little theory, placed so carefully before the swamp takes it.
Line: There—your neat little theory, placed so carefully before the swamp takes it.

Subtitle: Good. Hold tighter. Certainty drowns faster when it struggles.
Line: Good. Hold tighter. Certainty drowns faster when it struggles.

Condition: Player adapts to disruption and ambiguity
Subtitle: Mm. You bend without snapping. That is almost disappointing.
PerformanceDirection: A predator mildly denied its fun.
Line: Mm. You bend without snapping. That is almost disappointing.

Subtitle: Down it goes—your footing, your confidence, your precious sense of order.
Line: Down it goes—your footing, your confidence, your precious sense of order.

Subtitle: Feel it now? That shiver when the pattern stops promising safety?
Line: Feel it now? That shiver when the pattern stops promising safety?

Subtitle: Returned to the mire? Excellent. Most minds only need breaking once.
PerformanceDirection: Welcoming in the worst possible way.
Line: Returned to the mire? Excellent. Most minds only need breaking once.

Subtitle: Hnh. Then you have learned the rarest lesson: instability can be read, too.
Line: Hnh. Then you have learned the rarest lesson: instability can be read, too.

Subtitle: Ah! A fresh subject. Let’s see how much your insight costs once the clock starts collecting.
Line: Ah! A fresh subject. Let’s see how much your insight costs once the clock starts collecting.

Condition: Player begins experiment under time-tax pressure
Subtitle: Excellent, excellent—an opening hypothesis! Expensive, clumsy, but scientifically entertaining.
Line: Excellent, excellent—an opening hypothesis! Expensive, clumsy, but scientifically entertaining.

Condition: Player wastes a guess / fails to convert info
Subtitle: There goes another lovely chunk of time. You do spend progress like a fool.
Line: There goes another lovely chunk of time. You do spend progress like a fool.

Condition: Player extracts value from prior clues
Subtitle: Ohhh, that was clever. Irritatingly clever. Write that down—no, wait, I’ll do it.
Line: Ohhh, that was clever. Irritatingly clever. Write that down—no, wait, I’ll do it.

Condition: Time tax / abacus countdown / pressure spike
Subtitle: Discovery has a fee! Tick-tick-tick—surely you heard the invoice.
PerformanceDirection: Laugh on the first phrase; sharpen on the clock sounds.
Line: Discovery has a fee! Tick-tick-tick—surely you heard the invoice.

Subtitle: Splendid! We’ve reached the phase where panic starts masquerading as intuition.
Line: Splendid! We’ve reached the phase where panic starts masquerading as intuition.

Subtitle: Back again? Wonderful. Repetition is the mother of data and the father of breakdowns.
PerformanceDirection: Should feel like he has been waiting for this.
Line: Back again? Wonderful. Repetition is the mother of data and the father of breakdowns.

Subtitle: Impossible. No, no—possible, obviously, but offensively so.
PerformanceDirection: Let the logic keep going even as pride collapses.
Line: Impossible. No, no—possible, obviously, but offensively so.
